name: premierseyo-studio
description: Adobe Premiere Pro 2026 self-contained Auto-Cut + Auto-SRT plugin (AME native, no daemon, single .ccx)
author: SEYO

scripts.build: npm run bundle && npm run inline && npm run deploy
scripts.build:assets: npm run bundle && npm run inline
scripts.test:caption: node scripts/test-caption-grouper.js
scripts.test: npm run test:timeline && npm run test:caption
scripts.ci: npm run test && npm run check:js
